reviews.review_description: ...if u have steering wheel  this is awesome drifting game - just hold wheel and gear vr controller together!

This is a new review as the controller issue has been fixed (thanks for that).... solid game, fluid controls, good graphics... the actual core here is very good and hopefully the developers can take that and build even more... maybe a free roaming driving game which I much prefer to racing round tracks.... but even if they don't, the game here is as advertised... though perhaps could do with a options menu to turn off/down music etc

developer_response.body: Hi Freddy! Thanks for waiting for the patched version. Hope you enjoyed the game. In the future, we plan to improve it, and the next update with a new mod will be already this month.

reviews.review_description: Good track graphics and quality cars. Not immediately figured out with the car control, but then adapted and drifted easily. What is missing is the challenge. In general, not bad if you like drift.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this. We are working on challenge now. In the update, we will add a pair drift and a leaderboard.

reviews.review_description: Very awesome game with a great feel of controls. It may take a second to get good at drifting, but once you learn it you’ll feel pretty cool going around those corners. Great cars, catchy music, and well designed tracks. I only wish there were more tracks/modes. Otherwise the game has been a blast! For the price I still really recommend it!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear that you liked the game. We are still continuing to work on the game modes and its improvements.

reviews.review_description:
Over all I enjoy this game. I legit found myself smiling and really feeling like I am actually in a car doing drfts. This game is not perfect by anyone means. A few gripes I classify more as suggestions to increase the immersive factor. 
- Add reflections on the mirrors (rear view, side mirrors)
- Have the shifter change gears instead of staying in position (which I am assuming is neutral here) 
- Make the display show either D or R. The whole time it is on P. Feels kind of odd it showing as P while I am going in reverse.
 - Maybe have an option to use our own music, or no music. 

These following gripes are legt gripes that perhaps only I had a problem with.
- Points are so hard to calculate. Now, I am not a drifter in real life but it is so difficult to get a good outcome on a drift. One second I am at 4x then it drops to 1x.
- I earned over the 20K points and reached the finish line but am not able to go to the next track. I stay stuck with the only choice is the tutorial track. 

Now most of these gripes MAY NOT be even possible on the Go, but over I do enjoy what is there so far.

Good job team!

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for the detailed feedback and suggestions for improving the game. We will take into account your wishes and add to the updates what can be done.

reviews.review_description: Developers, could you please add an option to make the cockpit motionless regardless of what's happening with the car and outside of the car? (Even the lighting inside) I'm hoping for the option to make the inside of the cab only respond to the players head motions...I get motion sickness from one thing in particular, quick jerking movements that don't match my body’s experience. Either that, or sell me a chair that bumps right when the car bumps! As it is, I have to return this game because I'm not going to be able to play it until I have something to keep me from getting motion sick, and a motionless cockpit should do just the trick. I for one can re-buy this game if you add that option because then I'll be able to play it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. We will take into account your wishes and make the game better together. We will try to minimize the sikness in the next update.

reviews.review_title: No more updates for Gear VR?
reviews.review_description: I've seen that the game is now in 1.02 on go and it still stuck with 1.0 on Gear. There's no reason for not keep it updated, it's because of Oculus dropped the support that necessarily means that you guys have to drop the support too. As far as I'm concerned you just need to downgrade the library for one that Gear was supported.Just like the Song Beater Devs did and still keeping their game updated until now days.
Fun and pretty well made! In NEED OF MORE UPDATES THO.     Warning:don’t look down at your chest

The graphics and details are really good but how do i unlock the other tracks, cars? oh if possible can gamepad support with rotation, more tracks and a free driving mode be added just to relax and ride around? UPDATE: i noticed a user driving through a forest track with a bunch of trees and air balloons seen in the video but for some reason i dont have that track, is there a explanation?

developer_response.body: Hi Aaron! In order to open new tracks and cars you need to collect drift points in races. The car turns by turning the Go\GearVr controller. We use the accelerometer for more realistic control of the steering wheel and a sense of balance that is impossible to feel on a regular gamepad. We just added a new huge track with a free ride mode in 1.01 ver., where you can just roll across the mountainous roads and enjoy the drift. There is exactly the same track in the free ride mode like in video, but it is optimized for mobile.

reviews.review_description:
i really like this game, but it NEEDS more updates. Maps, and cars. you can get every car and complete every map woth 5 stars, in less than an hour. So, this is a good game, but also a very short one.
Greetings from Argentina.

I wasn't sure what to expect was surprised with a very fun drifting game. I know but developers are busy adding new features. Really the only feature that I would really like right now is the ability to turn the music down or off. As far as in-game music goes it is not bad though. Congratulations on a nice immersive feel, with no motion sickness.

developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback. We will take into account your wishes in the following updates.

reviews.review_description: I have a Go and a Quest and this is the best driving experience on either platform. I'm not a drift fan, I prefer all out speed racing but I love this. The experience of driving the car is great and practice makes perfect, getting longer drifts and hopefully keeping it off the walls. This needs porting to the Quest as well, in 6dof it would be stunning. Can you please produce a racing game using the same game engine, just against a few cars it would be great. I would love to drive that little yellow Porsche around the race track course against other cars. Only minus is that the steering glitches sometimes and throws me across the track. Other than that it's fantastic and I can wait to see more driving games from these devs.

Do we have option seeing the car while playing? I mean not inside the car .....using go controller....appreciate devs prompt response.
Any updates on this?
Also why only lady is the character? No option for gents?
Good game , needs a multiplayer mode , options to choose numbers of laps and more tracks if there's going to be a drift 2 . Please consider it!

Good Game. Good Drift.  A couple of suggestions to the devs if they want to improve the game or make a drift club 2.  

1. Add multiplayer with mic usage for drifting and racing.  
2. Improve the graphics and visuals of the tracks.  Not expecting it to be as good as real vr fishing or daedulus but there is room for improvement.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the suggestions for improving the game. We plan to make a PC version with multiplayer and better graphics. Together with the PC version, we will update the mobile version and add multiplayer pair drift.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on the Go!
reviews.review_description: This is my new favorite game to play on the Go. I really enjoy the mechanics and overall vibe but we need new tracks please:)

I really enjoy the game, im not even finished yet; but ive noticed a glitch. If you hit a wall while drifting then back out while holding the hand brake, your tilt controlls get reversed. Other than that i love the game!

So besides real fishing vr this is the best gsme to come out in awhile there isnt much content right now after a hour but they really nailed the feel thats why its worth it the drifring just feels right and if the stuff they promise is coming actually arrives with GO games you have on avg 50% at BEST for promised content to actually arrive i could list 20 examples but i wont just look at all the games that say "episode 1" for it just to be abandoned so fingers crossed a leaderboard needs to be FIRST and it needs to be a full leaderboard not just top 10 players so hopefully they arent just making up what ppl wanna hear i like to give the benefit of the doubt but these GO devs have been doing nothing but telling stories lately  🤔

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for the feedback. We are glad you liked the game. Don `t doubt, an update with a new mod and some fixes will be released this month.

reviews.review_title: Help will not install on Samsung S9+..
reviews.review_description: This app does not want to install on a Samsung S9+. Plenty of storage space, but it starts the process and then just says  could not install. Any thoughts from the developers here?

developer_response.body: Hi Dan! We apologize for the inconvenience. S9+ is not currently supported until troubleshooting.

reviews.review_title: Best Driving Game for the Oculus Go
reviews.review_description: Title says it all. Definitely one of the best Driving Sim games on the Oculus Go as of right now. While it does lack a lot of content and had no multiplayer, it's still worth the price since its fun enough to be replayed endlessly. Hopefully more updates and support for this app to come.
